# IBS Tracker - Copilot Instructions

This is a React Native Expo app for tracking IBS food triggers and symptoms with Claude AI integration.

## Project Overview
- **Type**: React Native (Expo)
- **Purpose**: IBS food and symptom tracking with AI analysis
- **Key Libraries**: React Navigation, Expo, AsyncStorage, Axios, Claude API

## Setup Notes
- Requires Node.js v16+ and npm
- Uses Expo for development and deployment
- Integrates Claude API for food analysis
- API key must be added to services/claudeApi.js before running
